patch:
commit 0a37290dc81037b966cb7dbfdaad71b46743daad
Author: Sanjay Patel <spatel@rotateright.com>
Date:   Mon Nov 14 11:54:47 2022 -0500

    [InstSimplify] restrict logic fold with partial undef vector
    
    https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/4ncsnX
    
    Fixes #58977

diff --git a/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp b/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
index bfb960a02a98..11ceff1a636d 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Analysis/InstructionSimplify.cpp
@@ -2241,7 +2241,7 @@ static Value *simplifyOrLogic(Value *X, Value *Y) {
   // (B ^ ~A) | (A & B) --> B ^ ~A
   // (~A ^ B) | (B & A) --> ~A ^ B
   // (B ^ ~A) | (B & A) --> B ^ ~A
-  if (match(X, m_c_Xor(m_Not(m_Value(A)), m_Value(B))) &&
+  if (match(X, m_c_Xor(m_NotForbidUndef(m_Value(A)), m_Value(B))) &&
       match(Y, m_c_And(m_Specific(A), m_Specific(B))))
     return X;

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i32> @or_xorn_and_commute2_undef(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_xorn_and_commute2_undef(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEGA:%.*]] = xor <2 x i32> [[A:%.*]], <i32 undef, i32 -1>
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and <2 x i32> [[B:%.*]], [[A]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR:%.*]] = xor <2 x i32> [[B]], [[NEGA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or <2 x i32> [[XOR]], [[AND]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[OR]]
  %nega = xor <2 x i32> %a, <i32 undef, i32 -1>
  %and = and <2 x i32> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i32> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i32> %or
}
tests.source_program:
define <2 x i32> @or_xorn_and_commute2_undef(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
  %nega = xor <2 x i32> %a, <i32 undef, i32 -1>
  %and = and <2 x i32> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i32> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i32> %or
}

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i32> @or_xorn_and_commute2(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_xorn_and_commute2(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEGA:%.*]] = xor <2 x i32> [[A:%.*]], <i32 -1, i32 -1>
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR:%.*]] = xor <2 x i32> [[B:%.*]], [[NEGA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[XOR]]
  %nega = xor <2 x i32> %a, splat (i32 -1)
  %and = and <2 x i32> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i32> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i32> %or
}
tests.source_program:
define <2 x i32> @or_xorn_and_commute2(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
  %nega = xor <2 x i32> %a, splat (i32 -1)
  %and = and <2 x i32> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i32> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i32> %or
}

tests.test_body:
define i32 @or_xorn_and_commute3(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_xorn_and_commute3(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEGA:%.*]] = xor i32 [[A:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR:%.*]] = xor i32 [[NEGA]], [[B:%.*]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[XOR]]
  %nega = xor i32 %a, -1
  %and = and i32 %b, %a
  %xor = xor i32 %nega, %b
  %or = or i32 %xor, %and
  ret i32 %or
}
tests.source_program:
define i32 @or_xorn_and_commute3(i32 %a, i32 %b) {
  %nega = xor i32 %a, -1
  %and = and i32 %b, %a
  %xor = xor i32 %nega, %b
  %or = or i32 %xor, %and
  ret i32 %or
}

tests.test_body:
define <2 x i32> @or_xorn_and_commute2_poison(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_xorn_and_commute2_poison(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEGA:%.*]] = xor <2 x i32> [[A:%.*]], <i32 poison, i32 -1>
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[AND:%.*]] = and <2 x i32> [[B:%.*]], [[A]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR:%.*]] = xor <2 x i32> [[B]], [[NEGA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR:%.*]] = or <2 x i32> [[XOR]], [[AND]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i32> [[OR]]
  %nega = xor <2 x i32> %a, <i32 poison, i32 -1>
  %and = and <2 x i32> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i32> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i32> %or
}
tests.source_program:
define <2 x i32> @or_xorn_and_commute2_poison(<2 x i32> %a, <2 x i32> %b) {
  %nega = xor <2 x i32> %a, <i32 poison, i32 -1>
  %and = and <2 x i32> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i32> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i32> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i32> %or
}

tests.test_body:
define i3 @or_xorn_and_commute1(i3 %a, i3 %b) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_xorn_and_commute1(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEGA:%.*]] = xor i3 [[A:%.*]], -1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[XOR:%.*]] = xor i3 [[B:%.*]], [[NEGA]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i3 [[XOR]]
  %nega = xor i3 %a, -1
  %and = and i3 %a, %b
  %xor = xor i3 %b, %nega
  %or = or i3 %xor, %and
  ret i3 %or
}
tests.source_program:
define i3 @or_xorn_and_commute1(i3 %a, i3 %b) {
  %nega = xor i3 %a, -1
  %and = and i3 %a, %b
  %xor = xor i3 %b, %nega
  %or = or i3 %xor, %and
  ret i3 %or
}

issue.title: InstSimplify: xor pattern miscompiles undef lane
issue.body:
This test case from Transforms/InstSimplify/AndOrXor.ll gets miscompiled because of the undef lane:
```llvm
define <2 x i4> @or_xorn_and_commute2(<2 x i4> %a, <2 x i4> %b) {
  %nega = xor <2 x i4> %a, { undef, 15 }
  %and = and <2 x i4> %b, %a
  %xor = xor <2 x i4> %b, %nega
  %or = or <2 x i4> %xor, %and
  ret <2 x i4> %or
}
=>
define <2 x i4> @or_xorn_and_commute2(<2 x i4> %a, <2 x i4> %b) {
  %1 = xor <2 x i4> %a, %b
  %xor = xor <2 x i4> %1, { undef, 15 }
  ret <2 x i4> %xor
}
Transformation doesn't verify!

ERROR: Target's return value is more undefined

Example:
<2 x i4> %a = < #xf (15, -1), #x0 (0) >
<2 x i4> %b = < #xf (15, -1), #x0 (0) >

Source:
<2 x i4> %nega = < #xf (15, -1)	[based on undef value], #xf (15, -1) >
<2 x i4> %and = < #xf (15, -1), #x0 (0) >
<2 x i4> %xor = < #x0 (0), #xf (15, -1) >
<2 x i4> %or = < #xf (15, -1), #xf (15, -1) >

Target:
<2 x i4> %1 = < #x0 (0), #x0 (0) >
<2 x i4> %xor = < #x0 (0), #xf (15, -1) >
Source value: < #xf (15, -1), #xf (15, -1) >
Target value: < #x0 (0), #xf (15, -1) >
```
issue.author: nunoplopes

comments.author: rotateright
comments.body:
This could be avoided if we replace undef with poison:
https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/NWFxa7

There may be some more faulty patterns near the one that causes this bug. I'll take a look.
